# Remote-access port connections (RDP / VNC / TeamViewer)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Lateral-movement / remote-access via well-known ports: `action_remote_port in (3389, 5900, 5938)` (RDP, VNC, TeamViewer). The numeric `in (...)` set works directly on `action_remote_port`. Group by process + destination + port to see which host initiated remote control to where — extend the port set for AnyDesk (7070), ScreenConnect, etc.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_remote_port in (3389, 5900, 5938)
| comp count() as c by actor_process_image_name, action_remote_ip, action_remote_port
| sort desc c
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (narrow 30-min window); measured ~0.0005 CU. Narrow the time window + filter early to keep real-dataset hunts cheap._
